title: Segmentation via Region Growing, Splitting, and Merging
description: A flowchart illustrating the workflow and decision points for combining region growing, splitting, and merging techniques to achieve final image segmentation.
relationships: Process starts with Original Image and selects Seed Points
Seed Points are grown into Initial Regions based on Homogeneity Criteria
Grown Regions are placed in a Region Queue for processing
Each region from the queue is checked; if a region is heterogeneous, it is Split into smaller blocks
Each block is re-checked for homogeneity, potentially leading to further splitting or growing
After growing and splitting, adjacent regions are checked for similarity and Merged if criteria are met
The process iterates until no more splits or merges are needed, resulting in the Final Segmented Image
